creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #3)
Thank you for committing in such an expedited way and giving the credits. My name got truncated a bit, but this patch was trivial, as Gert mentioned, and the PR number ended with 13 so this is absolutely understandable and forgiven. 
My true motivation was to change the port description. Thank you for preserving this part!
